targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bot_id) AS value FROM season_bots WHERE season_id = 'season-002' AND status = 'ready';
SELECT SUM(equity_btc) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-002' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) t;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bot_id) AS value FROM season_bots WHERE season_id = 'season-003' AND status = 'ready';
SELECT SUM(equity_btc) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-003' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) t;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bot_id) AS value FROM season_bots WHERE season_id = 'season-004' AND status = 'ready';
SELECT SUM(equity_btc) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-004' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) t;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM bot_orders WHERE status = 'filled';
SELECT SUM(realized_pnl_btc) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (season_id, bot_id) season_id, bot_id, realized_pnl_btc FROM bot_metrics ORDER BY season_id, bot_id, ts DESC) t;
SELECT ts AS time, equity_btc AS value, season_id || ' - ' || bot_id AS metric FROM bot_metrics ORDER BY ts ASC;
SELECT DATE(ts) AS time, season_id AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM bot_orders GROUP BY DATE(ts), season_id ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT b.bot_id, m.equity_btc, m.realized_pnl_btc, m.trade_count, m.drawdown_pct, m.ts FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, trade_count, drawdown_pct, ts FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-002' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) m JOIN season_bots b ON b.bot_id = m.bot_id WHERE b.season_id = 'season-002' ORDER BY m.equity_btc DESC;

SELECT b.bot_id, m.equity_btc, m.realized_pnl_btc, m.trade_count, m.drawdown_pct, m.ts FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, trade_count, drawdown_pct, ts FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-003' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) m JOIN season_bots b ON b.bot_id = m.bot_id WHERE b.season_id = 'season-003' ORDER BY m.equity_btc DESC;

SELECT b.bot_id, m.equity_btc, m.realized_pnl_btc, m.trade_count, m.drawdown_pct, m.ts FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, trade_count, drawdown_pct, ts FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = 'season-004' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC) m JOIN season_bots b ON b.bot_id = m.bot_id WHERE b.season_id = 'season-004' ORDER BY m.equity_btc DESC;
SELECT ts, season_id, bot_id, symbol, side, status, requested_quantity, executed_price FROM bot_orders ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50;
